infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Trailhead uses your location to show nearby campsites, reports, and to navigate your route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Trailhead uses your location in the background to trigger audio guide narration as you drive past landmarks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Trailhead uses background location to auto-play narrations while you drive.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Trailhead uses location to auto-play audio guides as you drive near landmarks.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Background location lets Trailhead narrate landmarks while your phone is in your pocket.
